file_path_or_dir.description: Absolute path to a C++ source file or directory to export.

build_path.description: Absolute path to the build directory containing compile_commands.json. Required for graph export.

db_uri.description: Bolt URI for the target graph database (e.g. 'bolt://localhost:7687').

recursive.description: If true and file_path_or_dir is a directory, recurse into sub-directories.

query.description: Cypher string (Neo4j) or IndraDB JSON query shape (IndraDB).

parameters.description: Bound parameters for Cypher queries (Neo4j only). Ignored for IndraDB.

row_limit.description: Maximum rows returned. Clamped to [1, 500]; default 200.

sample_size.description: Per-type vertex sample for property key inference; clamped to [10, 1000].
